content:
# Recommendations â€” after iter-028 (for the iter-029 plan agent)

## CRITICAL / HIGH

1. **SNAP â€” the crux is now precisely named: build `muGamma_collapse` via `Ď„`. Route through the
   analogist FIRST (2-iter HARD CAP, pc028 + iter-028 WATCH).** The iter-028 finding is decisive: the
   natural section-level reduction of `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` provably lands on the off-path sheaf
   pentagon (`hM = tensorPowAdd_assoc`). Pentagon-avoidance is REAL but carried *entirely* by the
   Ď„-flattening. The missing ingredient is `Ď„_{m,m'} : Î“(L^m) âŠ—_{Î“đť’Ş} Î“(L^m') â†’ Î“(P^{m+m'})` â€” and it is
   NOT a plain concatenation (`Î“(L^m) â‰  Î“(L)^âŠ—m`) nor Î·-inverse-derived. **Do NOT dispatch a prover to
   build Ď„ speculatively** â€” dispatch `mathlib-analogist` (cross-domain, seed `snap-gradedring-route.md`)
   to pin Ď„'s construction (factor through `Î·_m` / a presheaf `append`, bridging sheaf-power sections into
   `Î“(P^{m+m'})`) BEFORE prover budget. Also needed: a **presheaf-level** whiskering brick (the existing
   bricks take `f : Aâź¶A'` in `X.Modules`; flattening pushes the presheaf morphism `Î·_{m+m'}` through
   `sectionsMul`).

2. **SNAP blueprint â€” `lem:muGamma_collapse` Ď„ construction is under-specified; expand it
   (blueprint-writer) before the prover round.** The prose describes Ď„ only as "concatenate", eliding the
   sheafâ†”presheaf gap that is the real Lean obstacle. Writer directive: give Ď„ an explicit construction
   (via `tensorPowComparison`/`Î·` + presheaf `append`), and add `\lean{}` definition blocks for the four
   new carriers already in Lean (coverage debt, item 5). See the `% NOTE:` I left on `lem:muGamma_collapse`
   and `lem:sectionMul_coherent`.

3. **SNAP â€” reconcile the associativity narrative (route divergence, must-fix from lvbc).** The chapter
   (L3040â€“3043) disavows the object-level pentagon; the live Lean proof re-summons it. Decide: (a) finish
   the muGamma/Ď„ route so `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` is pentagon-free (preferred â€” the strategic premise of
   the whole pivot), or (b) accept the pentagon route and soften L3040â€“3043. The graded-ring headline
   `sectionGradedRing_gcommSemiring` is transitively `sorryAx`-backed until this closes â€” the DAG cone
   already shows it `proved=False`, so no marker fix is owed, but the headline is NOT done.

4. **FBC â€” dispatch BOTH replacement routes in PARALLEL (per iter-028 plan + strategy-critic).** The
   abstract-cocycle FOLD family is exhausted on all 3 sub-routes. Blueprint now carries Route A
   (`CatCommSq.hComp` functor-paste) + Route B (concrete-tilde re-derivation, Stacks 01I9). Both are
   creation targets â€” scaffold + dispatch both as parallel lanes; either closing the glue suffices. The
   blueprint chapter `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` was `complete:false/correct:false` last iter â€” the
   HARD GATE requires a fresh blueprint-reviewer pass (or scoped fast-path re-review) clearing it before a
   prover touches `FlatBaseChange.lean`.

## MEDIUM

5. **Coverage debt 84 â†’ 88: blueprint the 4 new SNAP decls (planner authors prose; review cannot).**
   All four are `lean_aux` unmatched, no `\lean{}` block:
   - `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.sectionsMul_whiskerRight` (L2999) â€” body
     `(sheafification_map_unit_top (whiskerRight fâ™­ Bâ™­) (aâŠ—b)).symm`; uses `sheafification_map_unit_top`,
     `MonoidalCategory.whiskerRight`, `toPresheafOfModules`. Naturality engine of `muGamma_collapse`.
   - `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.sectionsMul_whiskerLeft` (L3017) â€” symmetric (whiskerLeft).
   - `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.tensorPowPsh` (L3125) â€” flattened presheaf power `P^(k)`; the
     `muGamma_collapse` carrier. Recursive def, no deps.
   - `AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules.tensorPowComparison` (L3135) â€” comparison `Î·_k`; uses
     `PresheafOfModules.sheafificationAdjunction`. (Fold into the `lem:muGamma_collapse` env, per item 2.)

6. **FBC dead-mate apparatus â€” excise in a dedicated refactor iter (re-confirmed, lean-auditor CRITICAL).**
   `set_option maxHeartbeats 4000000 in` @FlatBaseChange.lean L2374 + L2409â€“2412 target `/-! -/` doc
   commands â†’ silent no-ops (Seam-2/3 decls run at default 200k). These guards are on the COMPILE-DEAD
   `base_change_mate_*` apparatus already slated for excision (sync the blueprint `\uses`, KEEP
   `base_change_mate_regroupEquiv` + `base_change_map_affine_local`). Not blocking; bundle with the SNAP
   off-path-excision refactor.

## Blocked / DO-NOT-RETRY (no structural change first)
- **SNAP â€” do NOT close `hM` by citing `tensorPowAdd_assoc`** (off-path/dead sheaf pentagon; resurrecting
  it into the live cone is a regression). The ONLY sanctioned close is the muGamma/Ď„ flattening route.
- **SNAP â€” do NOT touch the 4 off-path sorries** (`tensorPowAdd_rightUnit`/`braiding`/`assoc`,
  `tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs` @L2314/3213/3235/3250/3253) â€” strategy-forbidden, slated for excision once the
  section route closes.
- **FBC â€” do NOT author another abstract-cocycle FOLD variant** (all 3 sub-routes refuted). Only the two
  blueprinted structural replacements (CatCommSq / concrete-tilde).
- **SNAP â€” do NOT dispatch a prover to build Ď„ before the analogist consult** (2-iter HARD CAP; the prover
  explicitly declined a speculative Ď„ build this iter to avoid a RED file â€” respect that).

## Reusable proof patterns (â†’ PROJECT_STATUS KB)
- **`sectionsMul`-whiskering bricks close by `exact â€¦symm` (defeq), NOT `rw`** â€” goal in `sectionsMul`
  form, lemma in unit form; defeq-not-syntactic. Phrasing the transported factor as `(f.val.app âŠ¤).hom a`
  (= `(toPresheafOfModules X).map f`, rfl) makes the brick `rw`-match the downstream `Î“(ÎĽ)` form.
- **The section-level pentagon-avoidance is carried by Ď„-flattening, not by `assoc_core`** â€” any reduction
  that reassociates at the SHEAF level (via `sectionMul_assoc_core` over the sheaf associator Î±)
  re-summons the off-path pentagon `tensorPowAdd_assoc`. The flattening to `Î“(Î·)`-image of a presheaf
  tensor must happen BEFORE the reassociation.
